title: HTTPie Session
description: Schema representing an HTTPie named session, which persists headers, authentication, and cookies across requests.

name.description: The name of the HTTPie session.

host.description: The host associated with this session.

auth.description: Authentication credentials stored in the session.

username.description: Username for basic or digest authentication.

password.description: Password for basic or digest authentication.

headers.description: Default headers sent with every request in this session.

cookies.description: Cookies stored and sent with requests in this session.

domain.description: The domain the cookie is scoped to.

path.description: The path the cookie is scoped to.

expires.description: The expiration date-time of the cookie.

verify.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates for requests in this session.
